name: shopping-pp-mcp
description: Every LemmeBuyIt retail endpoint, plus a local store that compares one UPC across 70+ retailers, ranks weekly price drops, and computes Amazon FBA arbitrage margin — compound queries the per-retailer API can't answer.

shopping_api_key.title: SHOPPING_API_KEY
shopping_api_key.description: Sets SHOPPING_API_KEY for the Shopping MCP server.
